text_original: The softest thing in the world dashes against and overcomes the hardest;
text_normalized: The softest thing in the world dashes against and overcomes the hardest;

text_original: that which has no (substantial) existence enters where there is no crevice.
text_normalized: that which has no (substantial) existence enters where there is no crevice.

text_original: I know hereby what advantage belongs to doing nothing (with a purpose).
text_normalized: I know hereby what advantage belongs to doing nothing (with a purpose).

text_original: There are few in the world who attain to the teaching without words, and the advantage arising from non-action.
text_normalized: There are few in the world who attain to the teaching without words, and the advantage arising from non-action.
